errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

meta.title: PokloniMi — Celebrations without unwanted gifts
meta.description: Create a wishlist, share with guests, everyone wins. Guests don't need to register.

hero.headline: Celebrations without unwanted gifts
hero.subheadline: Create a wishlist, share it with your guests, everyone wins.
hero.note: No registration for guests. No app install.

step1.title: Build your list
step1.desc: Add the gifts you actually want, grouped by priority.

step2.title: Send to guests
step2.desc: Share a link on Viber, WhatsApp or SMS. No apps, no accounts.

step3.title: Enjoy the party
step3.desc: Guests pick in real time — no duplicates, no surprises.

item1.title: Zero friction for guests
item1.desc: No signup, no app. Just a link and 3 taps.

item2.title: Guest privacy
item2.desc: Guests pick with their name — no public lists, no awkwardness.

item3.title: Real-time list
item3.desc: The moment someone reserves, the list updates for everyone.

item4.title: Your style
item4.desc: Add your photo, message, and make the page truly yours.

mockup.title: What your guests will see
mockup.tagline: Open the link → see the list → pick a gift → done. Under 30 seconds.

testimonials.title: What users say
testimonials.t1: Finally something smart for a wedding. Every guest knew exactly what to bring.
testimonials.t2: We used it for Luka's first birthday. No duplicate gifts!
testimonials.t3: Sent the link to a family Viber group — within an hour everyone had picked something.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Sign up in under a minute
register.terms: By signing up, you agree to our terms and privacy policy.

errors.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.passwordSameAsOld: Pick a password different from the current one
errors.network: Cannot reach the server. Please try again.
errors.googleFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset it.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.subtitle: Pick a strong password you don't use anywhere else.
changePassword.oauthDesc: You signed in with a social account. Manage your password through that provider — there's nothing to change here.
changePassword.oauthOnly: This account uses social sign-in. There is no password to change.

resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
resetPassword.invalidTokenDesc: The password reset link is missing or invalid.
resetPassword.successDesc: Your password has been reset successfully. You will be redirected to sign in shortly.

loading.title: Verifying your email
loading.subtitle: Just a moment while we confirm your account…

success.title: Your email is verified
success.subtitle: You can now log in and start using your account.

error.title: Verification failed
error.subtitle: This link may be invalid or expired. Try logging in or request a new verification email.

step1.title: What's the occasion? 🎉
step1.messagePlaceholder: Dear guests, these are the gifts that would mean the most to us...
step1.imageHint: Drop an image here or click to upload

step2.title: What would you like to receive? 🎁
step2.desc: Add gifts and sort them by priority

step3.title: Review
step3.successDesc: Share the link with your guests and you're done.
step3.referral: Know someone who'd enjoy this? Share PokloniMi.

dashboard.title: My events
dashboard.emptyDesc: Create your first event in under 5 minutes.

private.title: This event isn't public yet
private.hint: If you're the host, sign in and open it from your dashboard to manage it.

guest.heroMessage: A list of thoughtful ideas — pick one that feels right.
guest.welcome: Pick a gift below — once you choose, the host knows and other guests won't see it as available.

empty.want: Nothing on the top wishlist yet.

notFound.title: Event not found
notFound.desc: We couldn't find that event. The link may be wrong or the event was removed.

success.title: Wonderful! 🎉
success.cta: Have your own celebration coming up?
success.shareSub: Share with someone planning a celebration:
